高仓健（Ken Takakura），原名小田刚一，出生于日本福冈县中间町，日本影视男演员、歌手，毕业于日本东京都明治大学商学科。

小时候因为身体弱，为了增强身体体质，而参加了骑术与拳击的训练  。1937年，6岁的高仓健进入了中间小学就读；之后，因患上了浸润性肺结核病，不得不休学疗养一年，他的父母为了其他孩子的健康，不得不把高仓健送到了伯父家，将他隔离在一个房间里  。

1939年，转入本城小学，就读二年级。1941年，转入香月小学，就读四年级。1943年，进入福冈县立东筑中学就读。1946年，在若松附近的液体燃料研究所当采煤工。1948年，中学五年级遇到学制改革，编入新制高中二年级，学校改名为东筑高等中学。1949年4月，进入明治大学商学部商学科就读  。

1954年3月，高仓健从明治大学毕业。1955年，因家人反对他的婚事而离家出走，只身跑到东京，并选择去应征新艺制片厂剧团管理见习生，却碰上东映公司事务理事牧野光雄，被对方拉入了东映公司“新演员训练班”，而他也将艺名改为了“高仓健” 。

高倉健（Ken Takakura），原名小田剛一，出生於日本福岡縣中間町，日本影視男演員、歌手，畢業於日本東京都明治大學商學科。

小時候因為身體弱，為了增強身體體質，而參加了騎術與拳擊的訓練 。1937 年，6 歲的高倉健進入了中間小學就讀；之後，因患上了浸潤性肺結核病，不得不休學療養一年，他的父母為了其他孩子的健康，不得不把高倉健送到了伯父家，將他隔離在一個房間裏 。

1939 年，轉入本城小學，就讀二年級。1941 年，轉入香月小學，就讀四年級。1943 年，進入福岡縣立東築中學就讀。1946 年，在若松附近的液體燃料研究所當採煤工。1948 年，中學五年級遇到學制改革，編入新制高中二年級，學校改名為東築高等中學。1949 年 4 月，進入明治大學商學部商學科就讀 。

1954 年 3 月，高倉健從明治大學畢業。1955 年，因家人反對他的婚事而離家出走，隻身跑到東京，並選擇去應徵新藝製片廠劇團管理見習生，卻碰上東映公司事務理事牧野光雄，被對方拉入了東映公司“新演員訓練班”，而他也將藝名改為了“高倉健” 。

data.biography:
英达，中国大陆演员和导演。毕业于北京大学心理学系及密苏里大学戏剧表演系。英达是一个幽默的人。娱乐圈多栖，导演、演员、主持人三位一体，无论是扮演影片《大腕》中的路易王，还是主持综艺节目《老同学大联欢》，英达都表现得活灵活现，游刃有余。尤其是继《我爱我家》《闲人马大姐》先后成功之后，英达更是奠定中国情景喜剧掌门人的地位。现在又相继推出《东北一家人》《相约青春》等系列喜剧。

1990年起任“北京人民艺术剧院”导演。1995年任“英氏影视公司”艺术总监。英达目前是美国哥伦比亚影片公司在中国的第一位合作导演。1995年与宋丹丹的婚姻宣告破裂。

英达一家是国内著名的影视家族，父亲英若诚是我国著名表演艺术家翻译家，现任妻子梁欢，梁欢的哥哥梁天和梁左，前妻宋丹丹，堂弟英壮，堂弟英宁，英宁之前妻赵明明都是影视圈内人物。

北京英氏影视传媒公司艺术总监和总导演，北京吉利大学英氏影视学院院长。
data.name: 英达

data.biography:
Archie Uchena Madekwe (nascido em 10 de fevereiro de 1995) é um ator inglês. Ele foi nomeado Estrela Internacional do Amanhã do Screen International de 2017. Ele é mais conhecido por seus papéis na série Apple TV + See (2019–2022), no filme de terror A24 Midsommar (2019), no filme de Neill Blomkamp Gran Turismo (2023) e no filme de Emerald Fennell Saltburn (2023).

Madekwe nasceu no sul de Londres. Seus pais se divorciaram quando ele era jovem. Aos 14 anos começou a estudar Teatro na BRIT School. Mais tarde, ingressou também no Teatro Nacional da Juventude. Ele continuou seus estudos na Academia de Música e Arte Dramática de Londres (LAMDA) e saiu cedo quando foi escalado para The Goat, or Who Is Sylvia?, de Ian Rickson. de Edward Albee no West End, ao lado de Damian Lewis e Sophie Okonedo.

Madekwe fez sua estreia na televisão em 2014 com uma participação especial em um episódio do drama médico da BBC Casualty. Ele então interpretou Luca em dois episódios da comédia dramática do Channel 4, Fresh Meat, em 2016.

Em 2017, Madekwe fez sua estreia no West End em The Goat, or Who Is Sylvia? no Theatre Royal Haymarket ao lado de Damian Lewis e Sophie Okonedo. Ele conseguiu seu primeiro papel no cinema como Luke em Teen Spirit depois que o diretor de elenco o viu na peça. No mesmo ano, ele também apareceu na sitcom Hang Ups do Channel 4.

data.overview: Câu chuyện của Barnie Madoff và mô hình lừa đảo tài chính Ponzi của ông sẽ được chiếu cùng giờ với Mỹ vào ngày 21/5 lúc 8 sáng, độc quyền trên HBO. Cũng sẽ có mặt trên hệ thống HBO ON DEMAND và HBO GO.Năm 2008, nhà môi giới tài chính, tư vấn đầu tư kiêm nhà đầu tư Bernie Madoff đã tạo nên chấn động toàn cầu khi ông bị bắt vì hành vi gian lận tài chính có lẽ lớn nhất lịch sử Hoa Kỳ. Bộ phim do HBO sản xuất “THE WIZARD OF LIES”, khởi chiếu cùng giờ với Mỹ lúc 8 giờ sáng và Chủ Nhật ngày 21/5 và phát lại lúc 21 giờ cùng ngày, mô tả hành vi gian lận tài chính Ponzi của Bernie Madoff – sự lừa giối này đã đẩy vợ con ông vào những áp lực ở phía sau sân khấu.

data.biography: Kazuko Shirakawa (born September 30, 1947) is a Japanese actress who is best known for her appearances in Nikkatsu's Roman Porno films during the 1970s. data.biography:
Édesapja japán, édesanyja dán. Féltestvére Kristoffer Sakurai szólótáncos. Koppenhágában született és Frederiksværk(wd) városában nőtt fel. Fiatal kora óta érdekelte a filmezés. 18 évesen úgy döntött, hogy szeretné megismerni a gyökereit, ezért kiköltözött Japánba, ahol színészmesterséget is tanult. Eleinte színházakban, majd filmekben is játszott, olyan kisebb japán indie-projektekben, mint a Tokyo G.P. gengszterfilm (2001) vagy – képzett harcművészként – a Scarlet Runaway harcművészeti film (2005) főszereplőjeként. 2008-ban tért vissza Dániába, többek között azért, mert anyanyelvén, dánul szeretett volna filmet forgatni. Itt a Dán Színészek Szervezeténél (DSF) folytatta a felkészülést. Egyik első főszerepét az Eastern Army-ban játszotta. Független filmes, dolgozott többek között Stellan Skarsgårddal, Steven Van Zandttal, Hans Petter Molanddal.

Mivel a dán mellett angolul és japánul folyékonyan beszél, akárcsak spanyolul és németül, így nemzetközi produkciókban is szerepel. 2012-ben Magyarországon vett részt forgatáson, Ujj Mészáros Károly Liza, a rókatündér című filmjében, ami japán mondavilágra épül, és 2015 februárjában került a mozikba.

A Wing Chun, thai boksz, dzsúdzsucu és arnis harcművészeti módokat is ismeri.

Feleségével Los Angelesben él.

data.biography:
Eliza Sam is a Canadian actress based in Hong Kong, currently under contract in TVB. She won the Miss Chinese Vancouver Pageant in 2009, and went on to win the 2010 Miss Chinese International Pageant. After winning the Miss Chinese Vancouver title 2010, Sam was involved supporting organizations such as the Canadian Cancer Society and S.U.C.C.E.S.S.. She won the World Chinese Entrepreneur Scholarship in January 2010, hosted by The 4th World Chinese Entrepreneurs Convention, Canada Founding & Development Society.

Sam's family are Hoa, with parents of Chinese descent from Vietnam, and grandparents from Guangdong and Fujian. She was born and raised in Vancouver, Canada. Eliza has also stated publicly that she is a Christian.

She graduated from Surrey's Kwantlen Polytechnic University in 2010, with a bachelor's degree in Business as well as a diploma in Marketing Management and a diploma in Fashion Design and Technology. She was an English teacher prior to participating in Miss Chinese International.

After winning the Vancouver pageant, Sam represented Vancouver in the Miss Chinese International Pageant 2010 organized by TVB. During her final speech (which was to void points from the previous performance segments) she talked about her Cantonese being weak, and thus spending one year to practice and improve her Cantonese. Sam won the competition under the new voting system. Later she signed with TVB. On 2 December 2016, Sam openly acknowledged her engagement on social media with her out of industry boyfriend Joshua Ngo. They married in Vancouver on 17 December 2016. In mid-June 2018 Sam announced on her social media that her eight-year contract with TVB has come to an end.
data.name: Eliza Sam

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Jun Matsumoto (born August 30, 1983) was born in Toshima, Tokyo, is known for his acting achievements in many Japanese dramas. Also widely known as "MatsuJun", is a Japanese actor, and TV host.  He is known outside Japan for he role in the Romance film Tokyo Tower (2005). He was also a main character in Kimi wa petto (2003), along with Koyuki. He rose to fame in the drama Kimi wa petto (2003) with Koyuki and gained huge popularity .  He first caught the attention of the public in 1997 by acting debut in TBS drama special Hoken Chousain, but quickly grew beyond drama and has earned acclaim as an actor through his many roles on Japanese television and in several Japanese films.  He also starred Boys Over Flowers series in 2005. He has gone on to appear in numerous dramas and movies, receiving a number of awards and nominations for his roles. He drama 99.9: Criminal Lawyer (2016) was popular in Japan with a peak viewership rating of 22.5%. He is very famous in Japan, and almost everyone knows him. Was best known until recently for his commercial work on Japanese television.  Over the years since the early 1990s, the actor has had roles in drama serials, movies, TV shows and even hosted red carpet events in his country like Minnano Televi and Utawara. Let's also not forget the innumerable CF (commercial film) advertisements that he's done, for brands like KFC in Japan, Kosé and Pepsi. He wore multiple hats as an actor, host and variety show personality.

Dan Levy began his television career as a co-host of MTV Canada's flagship show MTV Live and later co-wrote, co-hosted, and co-produced the critically acclaimed ratings hit The After Show and its various incarnations including The Hills: The After Show and The City: Live After Show. Levy also wrote, produced, and starred in his own Christmas Special for MTV, Daniel Levy's Holi-Do's & Don'ts for MTV and co-hosted the MTV Movie Awards Red Carpet, the X-Factor pre-show, and national coverage of the Vancouver Olympic Games for CTV. Levy's acting roles include the Canadian TV series Degrassi: The Next Generation and the thriller Off Line. He made his film debut opposite Tina Fey in Admission.

In 2013, Levy formed Not A Real Company Productions (with his father Eugene Levy and principals Andrew Barnsley and Fred Levy) to produce Schitt's Creek, a half-hour single cam comedy for CBC/ITV. Levy is the co-creator, co-executive producer, and writer of Schitt's Creek and stars alongside Eugene Levy, Catherine O'Hara, and Chris Elliott.
data.name: Dan Levy

Dan Levy begon zijn televisiecarrière als co-presentator van MTV Live, het vlaggenschip van MTV Canada. Later schreef, presenteerde en produceerde hij mee aan de veelgeprezen kijkcijferhit The After Show en de verschillende varianten daarvan, waaronder The Hills: The After Show en The City: Live After Show. Levy schreef, produceerde en speelde ook de hoofdrol in zijn eigen kerstspecial voor MTV, Daniel Levy's Holi-Do's & Don'ts, en presenteerde de rode loper van de MTV Movie Awards, de pre-show van X-Factor en de nationale verslaggeving van de Olympische Spelen in Vancouver voor CTV. Levy acteerde onder andere in de Canadese televisieserie Degrassi: The Next Generation en de thriller Off Line. Hij maakte zijn filmdebuut tegenover Tina Fey in Admission.

In 2013 richtte Levy samen met zijn vader Eugene Levy en de directieleden Andrew Barnsley en Fred Levy Not A Real Company Productions op om Schitt's Creek te produceren, een komedieserie van een half uur die met één camera wordt opgenomen voor CBC/ITV. Levy is medebedenker, mede-uitvoerend producent en scenarioschrijver van Schitt's Creek en speelt er zelf in, naast Eugene Levy, Catherine O'Hara en Chris Elliott.

Hứa Vĩ Văn (sinh ngày 25 tháng 12 năm 1979) là nam diễn viên, ca sĩ và người mẫu người Việt Nam. Lớn lên tại khu người Hoa Chợ Lớn, thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, là cựu sinh viên trường Đại học Mỹ thuật Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh khóa 2002. Với ngoại hình điển trai và khả năng diễn xuất tốt, anh nhận được rất nhiều tình cảm yêu mến từ các khán giả. Nổi bật với vai diễn Hai Hoàng trong bộ phim truyện nhựa Đam Mê (đạo diễn Phi Tiến Sơn, do Hãng phim truyện Việt Nam sản xuất) đã mang lại cho anh giải thưởng Cánh Diều Vàng năm 2012 ở hạng mục Nam diễn viên phụ xuất sắc - giải thưởng do Hội điện ảnh Việt Nam trao tặng.
data.name: Hứa Vĩ Văn

Salvatore Leopoldo "Leo" Gullotta (born 9 January 1946) is an Italian actor, voice actor, comedian and writer.

Born in Catania and the last of six children, Gullotta started his career as an extra in Teatro Massimo Bellini. In his long career as actor, Gullotta has starred in about 100 films and has participated in numerous shows and drama series for television. In 1987 he won his first David di Donatello for Best Supporting Actor for his role in Il Camorrista by Giuseppe Tornatore, and later worked with Tornatore four more times. In 1997 and 2000 he won two more David di Donatello for Best Supporting Actor, for the Maurizio Zaccaro films Il carniere and Un uomo perbene. He has also won two Silver Ribbon for Best supporting Actor, in 1984 for Mi manda Picone by Nanni Loy and in 2001 for Vajont by Renzo Martinelli.

Gullotta has starred in many theatrical plays and dramas, and was part of the theater company "Il Bagaglino". He won the Flaiano Prize as stage actor of the year in 2010. He celebrated fifty years of activity that same year.

Gullotta is also a well known voice actor, among others. He was the Italian voice of Manny in the first three films of the Ice Age film series. He reprised this role in short films and video games. He also dubbed Burt Young in Rocky, Joe Pesci in Once Upon a Time in America, Moonwalker, My Cousin Vinny and The Irishman, and the robot Johnny 5 in Short Circuit. He also became the new Italian voice of Woody Allen after the death of Oreste Lionello in 2009.

In 1998 Gullotta debuted as writer with the book Mille fili d'erba (Di Renzo Editore, ISBN 88-86044-87-9).

Gullotta is openly gay. He did not reveal his sexuality to the public until 1995. In 2019, he married his partner of 32 years. Gullotta is discreet about the details of his husband.

Source: Article "Leo Gullotta" from Wikipedia in english, licensed under CC-BY-SA 3.0.

Leo Gullotta (Catania, 9 gennaio 1946) è un attore e doppiatore italiano.

Ha una carriera lunga e ricca che abbraccia il teatro, il cinema e la televisione.

In teatro, ha recitato in numerosi spettacoli, dimostrando la sua versatilità e la sua profonda preparazione.

Nel cinema, ha interpretato una vasta gamma di ruoli, sia comici che drammatici. Tra le sue interpretazioni più celebri si ricordano i film con Giuseppe Tornatore, come "Nuovo Cinema Paradiso" (1988), per il quale ha vinto il Nastro d'Argento come miglior attore non protagonista, e "L'uomo delle stelle" (1995). Ha lavorato anche con Ricky Tognazzi in "La scorta" (1993) e con Nanni Moretti in "Palombella rossa" (1989). È stato inoltre un volto ricorrente nei film di Ficarra e Picone, come in "L'ora legale" (2017).

Gullotta è anche uno dei più noti doppiatori italiani, avendo prestato la voce a numerosi attori stranieri e personaggi animati, tra cui i celebri "Pumbaa" ne Il re leone e "Red" ne La Sirenetta.

In televisione, ha partecipato a diverse fiction e serie TV, consolidando la sua immagine di attore poliedrico e amato dal pubblico.
data.name: Leo Gullotta

data.biography:
Megan Burns (born June 25, 1986), also known as Betty Curse, is an English musician and actress.

Burns was born in Liverpool, England. When Burns was 11 her grandmother sent her to acting classes. From there she received a part in the film Liam (2000). She won the Marcello Mastroianni Award at the Venice Film Festival for her performance. Danny Boyle saw this and cast her in his film 28 Days Later, where she played Hannah, one of the survivors of a deadly epidemic. Megan was cast in the film In2ruders, directed by Naeem Mahmood, also starring Tony Hadley and Caprice Bourret.

Burns has since worked as a singer under the pseudonym Betty Curse. Her first single release was a double A-side, "Met on the Internet" and "Excuse All the Blood", released 29 May 2006. Her first album Hear Lies was released on 31 October 2006 via iTunes.

The CD version, Here Lies Betty Curse, was released in April 2007. The album's first single, "God This Hurts", was released in August 2007, shortly followed by "Girl with Yellow Hair" on 13 November. In 2006 she performed and won on a Halloween special of the children's television programme The Slammer with "Girl With Yellow Hair"
data.name: Megan Burns

data.biography:
Mimosa Helena Willamo (s. 1994) on suomalainen Jussi-palkittu näyttelijä. Hän syntyi kaksikieliseen espoolaisperheeseen, ja hän on tehnyt rooleja sekä suomeksi että ruotsiksi.

Willamo tunnetaan muun muassa rooleistaan elokuvissa Päin seinää (2014), Bodom (2016), Teit meistä kauniin (2016), Aurora (2019) ja Elvis & Onerva (2019) sekä komediasarjassa Erinomanlaiset (2016). Hänet palkittiin parhaan naissivuosan Jussilla roolistaan elokuvasta Päin seinää sekä parhaan naispääosan Jussilla roolistaan elokuvassa Aurora.

Willamo on saanut lisäksi sai roolistaan Bodom-elokuvassa parhaan naisnäyttelijän palkinnon Screamfest-kauhuelokuvafestivaaleilla Los Angelesissa Yhdysvalloissa vuonna 2016. Bodom-roolistaan Willamo oli ehdolla myös parhaan naispääosan Jussin saajaksi.

Vuonna 2014 Me Naiset -lehdessä Willamoa kutsuttiin kotimaisen elokuvan uudeksi tähdeksi. Willamo on näyttelemisen ohella työskennellyt myös koulunkäyntiavustajana sekä aiemmin Ylen lastenohjelmien juontajana ja käsikirjoittajana. Willamo kirjoitti Kallion lukiosta ylioppilaaksi vuonna 2013.

Maaliskuussa 2018 Willamolta julkaistiin single All on My Own nimellä ”Salla”. Kappale on osa HasBeen-sarjan soundtrackia,[9] ja sen ovat tehneet Iisa Pajula, Elias Gould, Noah Kin ja Minna Koivisto.

Willamo näyttelee nimiroolia Miia Tervon ohjaamassa romanttisessa komediaelokuvassa Aurora, joka sai ensi-iltansa tammikuussa 2019 Göteborgin elokuvajuhlien avauselokuvana. Willamo palkittiin roolistaan parhaan naispääosan Jussilla.

Hänellä on rooli myös Roba-poliisisarjan neljännellä kaudella ja jouluna 2020 ensi-iltansa saavassa elokuvassa Peruna.
data.name: Mimosa Willamo

Rea Tellervo Mauranen-Nuru (s. 25. huhtikuuta 1949 Helsinki) on suomalainen näyttelijä, joka on palkittu kahdesti Jussi-patsaalla.

Mauranen valmistui Suomen Teatterikoulusta vuonna 1973, minkä jälkeen hän näytteli yhdeksän vuotta KOM-teatterissa ja sittemmin myös useita vuosia Helsingin kaupunginteatterissa. Vuonna 1995 Mauranen jäi freelanceriksi. Hän on myös levyttänyt useaan otteeseen KOM-teatterin yhteydessä.

Mauranen on voittanut Jussi-palkinnon parhaasta naispääosasta elokuvassa Tulipää (1980) sekä parhaasta naissivuosasta elokuvasta Neitoperho (1997).

Hän näytteli yhtä pääosista, Tasavallan Presidentin kansliapäällikkö Marjatta Kuusistoa vuonna 2017 alkaneessa Ylen draamasarjassa Presidentti.

data.biography:
Jonathan Hyde (born 21 May 1948) is an Australian-born English actor, well known for his roles as J. Bruce Ismay, the managing director of the White Star Line in Titanic, Egyptologist Allen Chamberlain in The Mummy and Sam Parrish/Van Pelt, the hunter in Jumanji. He is married to the Scottish soprano Isobel Buchanan. They have two daughters, one of which is the actress Georgia King.

Hyde was born in Brisbane, Queensland. He is a member of the Royal Shakespeare Company. Among other roles, he played Ferdinand in a 1985 production of John Webster's The Duchess of Malfi. He graduated from the Royal Academy of Dramatic Art and is an Associate Member there. He was also an original cast member of Not the Nine O'Clock News, the first series of which was pulled from broadcast because of the General Election of 1979. Hyde has been in numerous films including The Contract, The Curse of King Tut's Tomb, Land of the Blind, The Tailor of Panama, Sherlock Holmes and the Case of the Silk Stocking, Eisenstein, Anaconda and Richie Rich.

He appeared in the 1989 BBC miniseries Shadow of the Noose in which he played the famous barrister Edward Marshall Hall. He has also appeared in several television mysteries, including The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes starring Jeremy Brett, and Midsomer Murders.

In 2007, Hyde played Dr. Dorn in Chekhov's The Seagull and the Earl of Kent in King Lear for the RSC in a repertory company that included Ian McKellen, Frances Barber, Romola Garai, William Gaunt and Sylvester McCoy. Both plays toured together internationally, before taking up residence in the New London Theatre. The final performance was on 12 January 2008. He reprised his role of Kent in the 2008 television film of King Lear.

data.biography:
Jonathan Hyde ausztrál születésű, angol színész, 1948. május 21-én született Bisbane-ben, Ausztráliában. Felesége, Isobel Buchanan, skót énekesnő. Két lányuk van, közülük az egyik színésznő.

Hyde tagja a Royal Shakespeare Company-nek. A Royal Academy of Dramatic Art-on végzett. Számos filmben és sorozatban szerepelt. Játszott a Midsomer gyilkosságok és a Sherlock Holmes  krimisorozatok egy-egy epizódjában is. 1994-ben szerepelt a Richie Rich-Rosszcsont beforr (Richie Rich) c. vígjátékban, majd 1995-ben a Jumanji c. kalandfilmben, ahol ő alakította a vadászt. 1997-ben a James Cameron által rendezett Titanic c. drámában is szerepelt, Bruce Ismay-t alakította. 1999-ben A múmia (The Mummy) c. kalandfilmben is játszott, az egyik egyiptológust formálta meg. Később 2001-ben A tolvajok hercegnője (Princess of Thieves) c. kalandfilmben tűnt fel, János herceg szerepébe bújva. Szintén 2001-ben szerepelt az Attila, isten ostora (Attila) c. történelmi filmben. 2006-ban A fáraó bosszúja (The Curse of King Tut's Tomb) c. kalandfilmben játszott.

Jonathan Stephen Geoffrey King (nascido em 21 de maio de 1948), conhecido profissionalmente como Jonathan "Nash" Hyde, é um ator australiano-inglês. Hyde é talvez mais conhecido por papéis como Herbert Arthur Runcible Cadbury no filme de comédia de 1994 Richie Rich, Samuel Parrish e Van Pelt no filme de aventura de fantasia de 1995 Jumanji, J. Bruce Ismay no filme romântico épico de 1997 Titanic, Culverton Smith em As Memórias de Sherlock Holmes, Warren Westridge no filme Anaconda, Dr. Allen Chamberlain no filme de terror de aventura de 1999 A Múmia, e Eldritch Palmer na série de TV do FX The Strain.

乔纳森·海德（Jonathan Hyde，1948年5月21日-）是一位出生于澳大利亚的英国演员，因在《泰坦尼克号》中饰演白星航运公司的总经理J·布鲁斯·伊斯梅、在《木乃伊》中饰演埃及学家艾伦·张伯伦和《勇敢者游戏》中的猎人山姆·帕里什/范·佩尔特而闻名。他与苏格兰女高音伊莎贝尔·布坎南结婚。他们有两个女儿，其中一个是女演员乔治亚·金。

海德出生于昆士兰州布里斯班。他是皇家莎士比亚剧团的成员。在其他角色中，他在 1985 年约翰·韦伯斯特 （John Webster） 的《马尔菲公爵夫人》中扮演费迪南德。他毕业于皇家戏剧艺术学院，是该学院的准会员。他还是《不是九点钟新闻》的原班人马，该剧的第一集因 1979 年大选而停播。海德曾出演过多部电影，包括《契约》、《图坦卡蒙国王墓的诅咒》、《盲人之地》、《巴拿马裁缝》、《夏洛克·福尔摩斯和丝袜案》、《爱森斯坦》、《蟒蛇》和《里奇·里奇》。

他出现在 1989 年的 BBC 迷你剧《绞索之影》中，他在剧中饰演著名的大律师爱德华·马歇尔·霍尔。他还出演了几部电视悬疑片，包括杰里米·布雷特主演的《福尔摩斯历险记》和《Midsomer Murders》。

2007年，海德在契诃夫的《海鸥》中扮演多恩博士，在《李尔王》中扮演肯特伯爵，为RSC的剧目公司演出，其中包括伊恩·麦凯伦、弗朗西斯·巴伯、罗莫拉·加莱、威廉·冈特和西尔维斯特·麦考伊。这两部剧在新伦敦剧院驻留之前一起在国际上巡回演出。最后一场演出于2008年1月12日举行。他在 2008 年的电视电影《李尔王》中重新扮演了肯特的角色。
data.name: 乔纳森·海德

data.biography:
喬納森·希迪（莊拿芬·希迪，1948 年 5 月 21 日-）是一位出生於澳大利亞的英國演員，因在《鐵達尼號》中飾演白星航運公司的總經理 J·布魯斯·伊斯梅、在《翻生木乃伊》中飾演埃及學家艾倫·張伯倫和《勇敢者遊戲》中的獵人山姆·帕里什/範·佩爾特而聞名。他與蘇格蘭女高音伊莎貝爾·布坎南結婚。他們有兩個女兒，其中一個是女演員喬治亞·金。

希迪出生於昆士蘭州布里斯班。他是皇家莎士比亞劇團的成員。在其他角色中，他在 1985 年約翰·韋伯斯特 （John Webster） 的《馬爾菲公爵夫人》中扮演費迪南德。他畢業於皇家戲劇藝術學院，是該學院的準會員。他還是《不是九點鍾新聞》的原班人馬，該劇的第一集因 1979 年大選而停播。希迪曾出演過多部電影，包括《契約》、《圖坦卡蒙國王墓的詛咒》、《盲人之地》、《巴拿馬裁縫》、《夏洛克·福爾摩斯和絲襪案》、《愛森斯坦》、《蟒蛇》和《里奇·里奇》。

他出現在 1989 年的 BBC 迷你劇《絞索之影》中，他在劇中飾演著名的大律師愛德華·馬歇爾·霍爾。他還出演了幾部電視懸疑片，包括傑里米·佈雷特主演的《福爾摩斯歷險記》和《Midsomer Murders》。

2007 年，希迪在契訶夫的《海鷗》中扮演多恩博士，在《里爾王》中扮演肯特伯爵，為 RSC 的劇目公司演出，其中包括伊恩·麥凱倫、弗朗西斯·巴伯、羅莫拉·加萊、威廉·岡特和西爾維斯特·麥考伊。這兩部劇在新倫敦劇院駐留之前一起在國際上巡迴演出。最後一場演出於 2008 年 1 月 12 日舉行。他在 2008 年的電視電影《里爾王》中重新扮演了肯特的角色。
data.name: 莊拿芬·希迪

data.biography:
Jonathan Stephen Gehring Hyde, 21 Mayıs 1948 tarihinde Brisbane, Queensland, Avustralya'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Orta sınıf bir ailenin çocuğu olarak büyüyen Hyde, oyunculuk tutkusunun peşinden giderek genç yaşta İngiltere'ye taşındı ve dünyanın en prestijli tiyatro okullarından biri olan Royal Academy of Dramatic Art'tan (RADA) mezun oldu. Kariyerinin temellerini tiyatro sahnesinde atan usta oyuncu, Royal Shakespeare Company'nin (RSC) saygın bir üyesi olarak "Kral Lear", "Macbeth" ve "Romeo ve Juliet" gibi klasik eserlerde rol alarak sahne hakimiyetini geliştirdi.

Sinema dünyasında ise özellikle 1990'lı yıllarda canlandırdığı aristokrat, sofistike ve genellikle elitist kötü adam rolleriyle tanındı. Geniş kitlelerin dikkatini çektiği ilk önemli yapım, Macaulay Culkin ile başrolü paylaştığı "Richie Rich" (1994) filmindeki sadık ve yetenekli uşak Herbert Cadbury rolü oldu. Ancak onu bir popüler kültür ikonuna dönüştüren performans, Robin Williams ile birlikte rol aldığı kült fantastik film "Jumanji" (1995) ile geldi. Bu filmde hem ana karakter Alan Parrish'in otoriter babası Sam Parrish'i hem de oyunun içinden çıkan acımasız avcı Van Pelt'i canlandırarak "Peter Pan" geleneğine selam duran çift roldeki ustalığını sergiledi.

Kariyerinin en büyük ticari başarısı ve küresel tanınırlığı, James Cameron'ın yönettiği ve sinema tarihinin en çok hasılat yapan filmlerinden biri olan "Titanic" (1997) filmindeki rolüyle gerçekleşti. Filmde, geminin sahibi olan White Star Line şirketinin başkanı J. Bruce Ismay karakterine hayat verdi. Trajedi sırasında filikaya binerek kaçan, kibirli ve korkak bir iş adamını canlandırdığı bu performans, izleyicilerin hafızasında derin bir yer etti. Bu dönemde ayrıca "Anaconda" (1997) filminde Warren Westridge ve kült macera filmi "Mumya"da (The Mummy) (1999) Mısırolog Dr. Allen Chamberlain gibi akılda kalıcı yan karakterleri canlandırdı.

Televizyon dünyasında ise son yıllardaki en dikkat çekici işi, Guillermo del Toro'nun yarattığı ve diğer "The Strain" oyuncularıyla birlikte rol aldığı aynı adlı dizideki (2014-2017) Eldritch Palmer rolüdür. Dizide, ölümsüzlüğe kavuşmak uğruna insanlığı vampir istilasına sürükleyen, hasta ve manipülatif bir milyarderi canlandıran Hyde, karakterin çaresizliğini ve hırsını derinlikli bir şekilde yansıttı. Ayrıca seslendirme sanatçısı olarak da çalışan aktör, "Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia" animasyon serisinde Waltriz / Strickler karakterine sesiyle hayat vermiştir. Jonathan Hyde, İngiliz tiyatro disiplinini Hollywood'un büyük bütçeli yapımlarıyla harmanlayan saygın bir karakter oyuncusu olarak kariyerine devam etmektedir.

Aaron Josef Hernandez (November 6, 1989 – April 19, 2017) was an American professional football player who was a tight end in the National Football League (NFL). He played three seasons with the New England Patriots until his arrest and conviction for the murder of Odin Lloyd.

data.biography: Jimmy Ray Bennett (born June 26 in Tallahassee, Florida) is an American actor, voice-over artist, and improviser. He is best known for providing the voice of Floyd Hebert in the 2013 video game Grand Theft Auto V and in television for the roles of Nathan Brooks in the Amazon Studios drama Hand of God and as the "White DL" in the Peabody Award-winning documentary DL Hughley: The Endangered List on Comedy Central.
